fields.name: Health Literacy
fields.description: Ability to find, umderstand and use of health-related information, which can be expressed as health knowledge, health literacy, patient educaiton or patient medication knowledge.

fields.name: Patient Autonomy
fields.description: The ability of individuals to take independent action in managing their health and actively participate in decisions about their care, which can be expressed as patient autonomy, patient empowerment, patient agency, patient involvement, patient decision making, patient experience, patient participation.

fields.name: Adherence
fields.description: The compliance of the patients to actively follow parts of therapy agreed with their physician, which can be expressed as treatment adherence, therapy adherence, patient adherence, medicaiton adherence, treatment compliance.
